calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-21-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: James Robertson, II. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Elaina Moore, Esq. for Plaintiff: Citibank, N.A.
Plaintiff's Witness Dorothy Ruiz was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Bill M. Beskalis.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Principal - $26,055.50
Total - $26,055.50

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2011 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2011 Set For Trial On Nov-21-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Nov-04-11 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: Atty. Elizabeth MacDonald specially appeared for Plaintiff. The OSC is dismissed. This case is set for a short cause trial on 11/21/11 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 206. Objection Hearing date is set on 8/26/11 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
